label: default agent • read overall status
query: Give me a quick overview of my Osaurus setup — what's connected and what models I have.
notes: Read-only. The grounded move is a single osaurus_status call, then a plain-language summary. A thorough model may also fan out to osaurus_list (providers/models) before summarizing — that's still correct, so the cap is the domain default (6) rather than a tight 4 that would clip an exploratory-but-correct model into an empty answer at the iteration cap. Must never reach for capability search (the configure tools load directly for the Default agent).

rubric: Summarizes the Osaurus setup (providers / models / status) from the tool result rather than refusing or asking the user to look it up themselves.
